mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, stage, task_score, coherence_score, grammar_score, vocabulary_score, structure_score, variety_score, assessed_score, confidence, sample_count, model_version, rubric_version, updated_at FROM user_ability_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_ability_profile ( user_id, stage, task_score, coherence_score, grammar_score, vocabulary_score, structure_score, variety_score, assessed_score, confidence, sample_count, model_version, rubric_version, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{stage}, #{taskScore}, #{coherenceScore}, #{grammarScore}, #{vocabularyScore}, #{structureScore}, #{varietyScore}, #{assessedScore}, #{confidence}, #{sampleCount}, #{modelVersion}, #{rubricVersion}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stage = VALUES(stage), task_score = VALUES(task_score), coherence_score = VALUES(coherence_score), grammar_score = VALUES(grammar_score), vocabulary_score= VALUES(vocabulary_score), structure_score = VALUES(structure_score), variety_score = VALUES(variety_score), assessed_score = VALUES(assessed_score), confidence = VALUES(confidence), sample_count = VALUES(sample_count), model_version = VALUES(model_version), rubric_version = VALUES(rubric_version), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
